info.headline: DANGEROUS man with firearm.
info.description: Residents: Seek immediate SHELTER or STAY INSIDE and close and lock doors and windows, do not leave a secure location. Lasaga was wearing blue jeans, a brown plaid shirt or jacket, white sneakers, and a fanny pack. He has brown hair and green eyes.
info.instruction: Do not provide a ride to anyone. Do not disclose police locations. Call 9-1-1 to report emergencies or tips. Updates posted to RCMPNS website and social accounts.

parameter.value: DANGEROUS man with firearm. RCMP searching for Christian Lasaga, age 30, last seen in area of Cumberland St. and Williams St.,Yarmouth. Believed to be armed and was last seen on foot. Residents: Seek immediate SHELTER or STAY INSIDE and close and lock doors and windows, do not leave a secure location. Lasaga was wearing blue jeans, a brown plaid shirt or jacket, white sneakers, and a fanny pack. He has brown hair and green eyes. Do not provide a ride to anyone. Do not disclose police locations. Call 9-1-1 to report emergencies or tips. Updates posted to RCMPNS website and social accounts.

DANGEROUS man with firearm. RCMP searching for Christian Lasaga, age 30, last seen in area of Cumberland St. and Williams St.,Yarmouth. Believed to be armed and was last seen on foot. Residents: Seek immediate SHELTER or STAY INSIDE and close and lock doors and windows, do not leave a secure location. Lasaga was wearing blue jeans, a brown plaid shirt or jacket, white sneakers, and a fanny pack. He has brown hair and green eyes. Do not provide a ride to anyone. Do not disclose police locations. Call 9-1-1 to report emergencies or tips. Updates posted to RCMPNS website and social accounts.

area.areaDesc: RCMP searching for Christian Lasaga, age 30, last seen in area of Cumberland St. and Williams St.,Yarmouth. Believed to be armed and was last seen on foot.
